title: dortmanna glandulosa
intro: Dortmanna glandulosa, also known as the Marsh St. John's Wort, is a perennial plant species within the St. John's Wort family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant offers various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Dortmanna glandulosa include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically for therapeutic purposes.
